notes: HAR-315 captured the current conformance credential blocker for staff utility roots: staffMember and staffMembers both return null plus ACCESS_DENIED errors. Authorized staff identity/catalog modeling remains unsupported until a credential with read_users and the required app/store eligibility is available; HAR-335 tracks that follow-up.

expectedDifferences.reason: The checked-in parity request is repository-formatted while the captured Shopify request carried extra GraphQL indentation; the line, path, message, and access metadata remain strictly compared.
